item.title:
Interactive charts and diagrams are now in Claude Cowork.
Available in beta on all paid plans.
item.description:
Interactive charts and diagrams are now in Claude Cowork.
Available in beta on all paid plans.

item.title:
In Cowork, Claude can now build live artifacts: dashboards and trackers connected to your apps and files.
Open one any time and it refreshes with current data. https://t.co/oru97zRn8L
item.description:
In Cowork, Claude can now build live artifacts: dashboards and trackers connected to your apps and files.
Open one any time and it refreshes with current data. https://t.co/oru97zRn8L

item.title:
The Claude Code hackathon is back for Opus 4.7.
Join builders from around the world for a week with the Claude Code team in the room, with a prize pool of $100K in API credits.
Apply by Sunday: http
item.description:
The Claude Code hackathon is back for Opus 4.7.
Join builders from around the world for a week with the Claude Code team in the room, with a prize pool of $100K in API credits.
Apply by Sunday: https://t.co/5MCkMtP5ti https://t.co/xmVhEQGtaL

item.title: Claude for Word is now available on Pro and Max plans to use alongside Opus 4.7: https://t.co/MJ89c4IuTt https://t.co/Yb3ZZQTsXb
item.description: Claude for Word is now available on Pro and Max plans to use alongside Opus 4.7: https://t.co/MJ89c4IuTt https://t.co/Yb3ZZQTsXb

item.title:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.
Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on
item.description:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.
Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX

item.title:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable Opus model yet.
It handles long-running tasks with more rigor, follows instructions more precisely, and verifies its own outputs before reporting back.
item.description:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable Opus model yet.
It handles long-running tasks with more rigor, follows instructions more precisely, and verifies its own outputs before reporting back.
You can hand off your hardest work with less supervision. https://t.co/PtlRdpQcG5

item.title:
We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop.
You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side from one window, with a new sidebar to manage them all. https://t.co/tfkjolVc71
item.description:
We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop.
You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side from one window, with a new sidebar to manage them all. https://t.co/tfkjolVc71

item.title:
Now in research preview: routines in Claude Code.
Configure a routine once (a prompt, a repo, and your connectors), and it can run on a schedule, from an API call, or in response to an event.
Routin
item.description:
Now in research preview: routines in Claude Code.
Configure a routine once (a prompt, a repo, and your connectors), and it can run on a schedule, from an API call, or in response to an event.
Routines run on our web infrastructure, so you don't have to keep your laptop open. https://t.co/m2XJWYqkf

item.title:
Claude for Word is now in beta.
Draft, edit, and revise documents directly from the sidebar. Claude preserves your formatting, and edits appear as tracked changes.
Available on Team and Enterprise p
item.description:
Claude for Word is now in beta.
Draft, edit, and revise documents directly from the sidebar. Claude preserves your formatting, and edits appear as tracked changes.
Available on Team and Enterprise plans. https://t.co/tl1mZVELNg
